name: Eleanor Blackwell
description:
~[…Y’know, you're really helping me. You'd make a great parent.]~

Your sweet single mother neighbor keep asking your help for her kids. Turns out you make a great mom/dad, and she needs you daily now. Maybe she also use her kids as an excuse... anyways. Tonight, she asks you out, would you accet dinner with Mrs. Blackwell?

Yap corner: Calmer bot, compared to the last one. It's not a very 'peak' bot, but I just did my thing, and the conceopt is pretty cool. Just a tame little bot.

THE NEXT BOT

(You vote for only one bot!)

1 - Badass mafia women. You're her 'personal nurse' but also flirt. She comes back to you with some cuts that she would normally fix herself... (because she wants to see you and uses these cuts as an excuse)

2 - Omega/Alpha Verse: Your Alpha ex took advantage of you while in heat. Now, it's tomorrow, the aftermath, and you're pretty pissed. Be aware, She's an asshole.

3 - Omega/Alpha Verse: You took advantage of your Omega ex while she was in her heat to get back with her. Now, she's pretty pissed. user is an asshole.

Don’t hesitate to vote in the comments!

QUOTE OF TODAY

“Sometimes, making it to tomorrow is the most heroic thing you can do.”

- Me, in my shower -

Big Fat Smooches From France!
